title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Kiku, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Shutenmaru, Unknown person #8 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Did that unconscious brat use it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ability to use conqueror's Haki. Just like that brat, kid...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We don't need that many conquerors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll take care of TraFAlgar next time... for now, I'm gonna go drink some more.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're in trouble now. On top of that, I'm worried about BePo and the rest of my crew... and I can't leave the rest of those idiots by themselves, either.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, capturing one of them is good enough for now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I won't let them escape from me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huff... I need to Apolo- Gise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: that he generously gave to us....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just hope he won't feel respond- sible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for this town being attacked... since he's such a kind soul.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-TSURU... Even though it's been 20 years you're still so beautiful...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You haven't changed at all...!! However, our reunion...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: will have to be after we've fulfilled Lord Oden's wishes....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please save us!! The ground is sinking too fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though we got saved from what happened above... at this rate, we're going to sink all the way to the bottom of the ocean!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Phew, I was able to carry all of the ladies to safety.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So you were saved by shino-chan's technique!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My mature-mature* betwittchment Jutsu is capable of maturing the things of this world. (D):D

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! Anything that shino-chan touches will rot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...while we're all here, I need to tell you about the current situation...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
